name: capture_screenshot
description: Capture a screenshot of the current scene or game view. Returns the file path of the saved PNG image — use your Read tool on that path to view it. Use 'scene' for 3D world layout (Scene View camera). Use 'game' for what the player sees through the main camera — preferred for UI work. Note: Screen Space - Overlay UI canvases are only fully visible when using 'game' source with the game in play mode.

source.description: Which camera to capture from. 'scene' = Scene View camera (default). 'game' = the main game camera (Camera.main) — use this for UI work.

width.description: Image width in pixels. Default: 1920. Max: 3840.

height.description: Image height in pixels. Default: 1080. Max: 2160.
